policy_notes: Session distillation is inspectable local state, not hidden adaptation.
A distillation record may summarize multiple session signals before any durable promotion occurs.
Promotion into relationship memory must be explicit and category-bounded.
Weak signals should remain inspectable local artifacts instead of rewriting the operator profile.
Business review is the default meaningful session closeout surface for continuity.
Continuity checkpoints should refresh the assistant-local latest-memory pointer.
Drift-risk or unclear closeouts may promote into alignment_risk instead of the default category.
Assistant memory is local restart state for continuity, not canonical lifecycle state.
Duplicate memory ids fail closed unless replace-existing is explicit.
The latest-memory pointer should reference only files under the declared storage root.
Use communication_pattern and alignment_risk categories to keep adaptation inspectable instead of hidden.
Session distillation should stay inspectable even when a weak signal is not promoted into durable relationship memory.
Session distillation must not refine the operator profile directly.
Only repeated or confirmed session signals should promote into durable assistant memory by default.
